prompt: An anime illustration of an {argument name="character description" default="elf girl with long white twintails and pointy ears"}. She wears {argument name="eyewear" default="dark sunglasses"} and a {argument name="outfit" default="white capelet with gold trim, striped shirt, and white skirt"}. She is {argument name="pose" default="sitting on a large wet rock in a clear river"}, leaning back with a detached expression. The scene is set in a {argument name="environment" default="lush green forest with a cascading waterfall in the background"}. Cinematic lighting, dappled sunlight, and detailed water textures enhance the vibrant anime style.
translatedPrompt: 一张动漫风格的插画，主角是 {argument name="character description" default="留着白色双马尾、长着尖耳朵的精灵少女"}。她戴着 {argument name="eyewear" default="深色墨镜"}，身穿 {argument name="outfit" default="带有金色饰边的白色斗篷、条纹衬衫和白色短裙"}。她 {argument name="pose" default="坐在清澈溪流中的一块大湿岩石上"}，向后倚靠，表情悠闲。场景设定在 {argument name="environment" default="郁郁葱葱的森林中，背景是层叠的瀑布"}。电影级光效、斑驳的阳光和细腻的水面质感，进一步增强了生动的动漫风格。

breakdown.creativeCore: 在森林溪流中放松的动漫精灵少女：生成一张高质量的动漫插画，描绘一个角色在茂密森林环境中的河边岩石上放松的场景。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
